name: Boston
bio: Boston has a durable classic rock catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and long-tail discovery.
notable_for: Boston remains closely associated with More Than a Feeling and Peace of Mind, which continue to anchor catalog attention.
career_highlight: Songs like More Than a Feeling and Peace of Mind still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Classic catalog streaming keeps major songs active well beyond the original release cycle.
Playlist longevity and generational rediscovery support steady long-tail listening.
Film, television, sports, and trailer usage can reactivate demand for familiar recordings.
